title: gmelina smithii
intro: Gmelina smithii, also known as the Sandalwood tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Pacific Islands, belonging to the family Verbenaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its ability to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Gmelina smithii include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Gmelina smithii include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and topical creams for various therapeutic applications.
